name: RPlog_C_Is_For_Cookey
title: C Is for Cookey
summary: At the Cat's Claw cantina on Ord Mantell, a foul-tempered squib refugee named Grizzlawlooraleth-Itabo, called Cookey, storms in demanding Blackwood ale and grumbling over his bad luck. The pirate captain Salty Jack, a quarren and recent fixture at the bar, overhears and shares a measure of his own genuine Blackwood, toasting a lost crewmate while sizing the newcomer up. Learning that Cookey was the cook aboard the doomed Black Betty, Jack offers him a berth in his galley as part of a new venture more lucrative than ordinary piracy. Cookey agrees over a drink, insisting only that his galley remain his sole domain. The deal sealed with a clashing of mugs, Cookey heads off to a paid room to sleep, far less disgruntled than when he arrived.
